name: Documentation

assignees: ""

# 📚 Documentation Improvement

## Summary

Provide a short description of the documentation issue or improvement.

---

## Current Documentation

Which document needs to be updated?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] ROADMAP.md
- [ ] SECURITY.md
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Other

---

## What Needs to Be Improved?

Describe what is currently missing, incorrect, outdated, or unclear.

---

## Suggested Changes

Describe how you think the documentation should be updated.

If possible, include example text or links to relevant resources.

---

## Why Is This Important?

Explain how this change will improve the project or help contributors.

---

## Related Files

List any documentation or source files that may need to be updated.

Example:

- README.md
- docs/architecture.md
- app/agents/planner.py

---

## Additional Context

Add any additional information, screenshots, diagrams, or references that may help.

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] This documentation improvement has not already been proposed.
- [ ] I am willing to submit a Pull Request for this change.
